steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3201, click Analytics nav button
steps.expected: Analytics page loads with charts section
steps.observed: Analytics page loaded successfully with Charts heading and three chart areas

steps.action: Verify data-testid elements exist for all three charts
steps.observed: All three data-testids confirmed present via JavaScript evaluation

steps.action: Verify charts have rendered canvas content (non-zero dimensions and drawn pixels)
steps.expected: Each chart canvas has width/height > 0 and drawn pixel content
steps.observed: Donut: 240x240 (6 drawn pixels in sample), Bar: 558x280 (76 drawn pixels), Line: 1175x280 (47 drawn pixels)

steps.expected: Screenshot shows all three charts with data

steps.action: Navigate to Analytics page, verify export buttons and count
steps.expected: Export buttons visible, export count shows '11 tasks'
steps.observed: Export buttons visible, data-testid='export-count' shows '11 tasks'

steps.expected: CSV has correct headers and 11 task rows
steps.observed: CSV has headers: ID,Title,Description,Status,Task Type,Project,Agent,Requires Approval,Created At,Updated At,Claimed At. Contains 11 data rows with correct values including project names (Alpha Project, Beta Project) and agent IDs resolved

csvDetails.headers: ID,Title,Description,Status,Task Type,Project,Agent,Requires Approval,Created At,Updated At,Claimed At

steps.expected: JSON array with 11 task objects including enriched data (projectName, agentName)
steps.observed: Valid JSON array with 11 objects. Each object contains: id, title, description, status, taskType, projectId, projectName, agentId, agentName, requiresApproval, createdAt, updatedAt, claimedAt. Project names and agent names correctly resolved.

steps.action: Take screenshot of initial filters state (no filters applied)
steps.expected: All Projects selected, date fields empty, 11 tasks shown
steps.observed: Confirmed: project filter = All Projects, date fields empty, export count = 11 tasks, agent table shows 3 agents

steps.action: Apply project filter: select Alpha Project
steps.expected: Export count and agent stats update to show only Alpha Project tasks
steps.observed: Export count changed from 11 to 7 tasks. Agent data updated: agent aaaaaaaa total=5, cccccccccccc total=1, bbbbbbbbbbbb total=1. All restricted to Alpha Project.

steps.action: Take screenshot after project filter applied
Clear project filter and apply date range filter (from 2026-03-15)
steps.expected: Analytics metrics and charts update to show 0 tasks (all created on 2026-03-14)
steps.observed: Date filter set to 2026-03-15. API requests confirmed including date_from=2026-03-15. Analytics metrics returned 0 tasks. Agent table cleared. Charts show empty data.

steps.action: Take screenshot after date filter applied

steps.expected: All filters cleared, data returns to showing all projects
steps.observed: Filters cleared: project filter back to All Projects, date from cleared to empty. Export count returned to 11 tasks. Agent data restored: 3 agents with original totals (6, 3, 2).

frictions.description: The export task count (data-testid='export-count') does not reflect date filter changes - it only filters by project. The analytics metrics and charts DO correctly respond to date filters. This is by design in the codebase (taskQueryParams in Analytics.tsx only includes project_id, not date params).
frictions.resolution: Verified that analytics API endpoints (/api/analytics/tasks, /api/analytics/agents, etc.) correctly receive and apply date_from parameter. The export count is derived from /api/tasks which does not support date filtering - this is expected behavior since the validation contract specifies filters update 'analytics and charts', not export data.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-ANAL-006: Three charts (donut, bar, line) render correctly with actual pixel content. VAL-ANAL-004: CSV export downloads valid file with correct headers and 11 task rows. VAL-ANAL-005: JSON export downloads valid file with 11 enriched task objects. VAL-ANAL-007: Project filter and date range filter both work correctly - project filter updates export count and agent stats, date filter updates analytics metrics and charts. Clear button properly resets all filters.
